channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-883] commit-msg disallows common reference tags
item.description:
The code needs to be extended to add these tags:

+ readonly INNOCUOUS='^('$(
+ echo \
+ Acked-by \
+ Tested-by \
+ CC \
+ Reported-by \
+ Reviewed-by \
+ | sed 's/ /|/g'
+ )'):'

and to be able to add more in a trivial fashion.
Adding to this echo list should be trivial enough.
item.environment: Development -- the commit validation script disallows "Reviewed-By:" tags at the end of the commit message

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment:
Bruce,

I have issue with commit-msg script on my MacOS.

It appears MacOS uses BSD version of fmt so there is no --split-only option:
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=fmt&sektion=1
but linux has it:
http://linux.die.net/man/1/fmt

So I have created this patch to see errors from commit-msg on MacOS:
http://review.whamcloud.com/2192

Thanks.

Integrated in lustre-master » i686,client,el6,ofa #480
LU-883 ldiskfs: drop unused diagnostic information (Revision fa0d7301502b5a29a8dd1a1008ab3e668c075359)

Result = ABORTED
Oleg Drokin : fa0d7301502b5a29a8dd1a1008ab3e668c075359
Files :

  • lustre/kernel_patches/patches/dev_read_only-2.6.32-rhel6.patch
  • ldiskfs/kernel_patches/patches/ext4-mballoc-pa_free-mismatch-rhel6.patch
  • ldiskfs/kernel_patches/patches/ext4-mballoc-pa_free-mismatch.patch
